New version 1.7.6 is released.

Please commit attached patch instead of original one.

Regards.

----Next_Part(Mon_Jul__7_10_56_51_2008_577)--
Content-Type: Text/Plain; charset=us-ascii

Content-Disposition: inline; filename=patch-xpi-noscript

Index: Makefile
===================================================================

retrieving revision 1.42
diff -u -r1.42 Makefile
--- Makefile	14 May 2008 04:49:32 -0000	1.42
+++ Makefile	7 Jul 2008 01:39:33 -0000
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	noscript
-PORTVERSION=	1.6.5
+PORTVERSION=	1.7.6
 DISTVERSIONSUFFIX=	-fx+mz+sm
 CATEGORIES=	www
